scripts.buildWin: npm run buildFrontendWin&&npm run buildServerWin&&npm run copyFrontendWin&&npm run copyServerWin&&npm run buildExtensionWin
scripts.buildServerWin: cd .\packages\server&&npm install&&npm run build&&npm run packageWin
scripts.buildLinuxX64: npm run buildFrontendLinux&&npm run buildServerLinuxX64&&npm run copyFrontendLinux&&npm run copyServerLinux&&npm run buildExtensionLinux
scripts.buildLinuxArm: npm run buildFrontendLinux&&npm run buildServerLinuxArm&&npm run copyFrontendLinux&&npm run copyServerLinux&&npm run buildExtensionLinux
scripts.buildServerLinuxX64: cd ./packages/server&&npm install&&npm run build&&npm run packageLinuxX64
scripts.buildServerLinuxArm: cd ./packages/server&&npm install&&npm run build&&npm run packageLinuxArm
scripts.test: cd ./packages/frontend && npm install --force && npm run test
